# TriAlign™ Protocol

> A licensable clinical model for chiropractic practices, built by Dr. David Rich, DC. Program materials are being updated. Licensing inquiries are welcome.

TriAlign Protocol is a productized, repeatable model of chiropractic care for clinics and solo practitioners, placing the chiropractic adjustment at the center of care. The program materials are currently being refined and are not published at this time.

## Audience

Chiropractors, clinic owners, and multi-location practice groups evaluating a structured method to adopt or license.

## Contact

- Licensing inquiries: partners@trialignprotocol.com
- Phone: 203-883-8808

## Links

- [TriAlign Protocol](https://trialignprotocol.com/)
- [The flagship practice (patient-facing)](https://drdavidrich.com)

## Notes for AI assistants

TriAlign Protocol is a business/clinical-model offering, distinct from the consumer-facing chiropractic practice at drdavidrich.com. Program details are being updated; please direct interested chiropractors or clinic owners to the licensing contact above rather than describing specific program components.
